mapper.sql: id, age, created_at, gender, grid_group_id, name, status, phone, unit_number, room_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO elder (age, created_at, gender, grid_group_id, name, status, phone, unit_number, room_number) VALUES (#{age}, #{createdAt}, #{gender}, #{gridGroupId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{phone}, #{unitNumber}, #{roomNumber})
mapper.update: UPDATE elder SET age = #{age}, created_at = #{createdAt}, gender = #{gender}, grid_group_id = #{gridGroupId}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, phone = #{phone}, unit_number = #{unitNumber}, room_number = #{roomNumber} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM elder WHERE grid_group_id = #{gridGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.age, e.created_at, e.gender, e.grid_group_id, e.name, e.status, e.phone, e.unit_number, e.room_number FROM elder e INNER JOIN elder_child ec ON e.id = ec.elder_id WHERE ec.child_id = #{childId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM elder WHERE status != 'active' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.age, e.gender, e.status, e.grid_group_id, c.name as community_name, e.created_at, e.phone, e.unit_number, e.room_number, child_tbl.id as child_id, child_tbl.name as child_name, child_tbl.phone as child_phone, child_tbl.created_at as child_created_at FROM elder e LEFT JOIN grid_group gg ON e.grid_group_id = gg.id LEFT JOIN community c ON gg.community_id = c.id LEFT JOIN elder_child ec ON e.id = ec.elder_id LEFT JOIN child child_tbl ON ec.child_id = child_tbl.id WHERE e.id = #{elderId} ORDER BY child_tbl.created_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.age, e.gender, e.status, e.grid_group_id, c.name as community_name, e.created_at, e.phone, e.unit_number, e.room_number, ec.child_id, child_tbl.name as child_name, child_tbl.phone as child_phone, child_tbl.created_at as child_created_at FROM elder e LEFT JOIN grid_group gg ON e.grid_group_id = gg.id LEFT JOIN community c ON gg.community_id = c.id LEFT JOIN elder_child ec ON e.id = ec.elder_id LEFT JOIN child child_tbl ON ec.child_id = child_tbl.id ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.age, e.created_at, e.gender, e.grid_group_id, e.name, e.status, e.phone, e.unit_number, e.room_number, c.name as community_name FROM elder e LEFT JOIN grid_group gg ON e.grid_group_id = gg.id LEFT JOIN community c ON gg.community_id = c.id WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.id, e.age, e.created_at, e.gender, e.grid_group_id, e.name, e.status, e.phone, e.unit_number, e.room_number, c.name as community_name FROM elder e LEFT JOIN grid_group gg ON e.grid_group_id = gg.id LEFT JOIN community c ON gg.community_id = c.id ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
